docTitle: Baibulo pa Mapu · Baibulo mu Kukulungutsa Kumodzi
metaDesc: Tsatirani nthawi ya Chipangano Chakale, moyo wa Yesu, ndi maulendo a Paulo pa mapu enieni — Baibulo linachitikadi m'malo enieni.

s.title: Baibulo pa Mapu
s.verse: “Pakuti sitinatsate miyambi yachabe, pamene tinakudziwitsani mphamvu ndi maonekedwe a Ambuye wathu Yesu Khristu, koma tinapenya m'maso ukulu wake.” (2 Petro 1:16)
s.purpose: Baibulo si nthano. Ndi mbiri ya anthu amene anayenda m'malo, masiku, ndi maina enieni. Tsatirani njira zimenezo pa mapu, motsatira nthawi — tinthani malo, kapena dinani ▶ kuti muziyenda mmenemo pang'onopang'ono.
s.ot_h: Kuyambira chilengedwe mpaka kubwerera ku Yerusalemu
s.ot_lead: Si ulendo umodzi koma kuyenda kwa mbiri ya chiwombolo kuyambira chilengedwe: chilengedwe ndi kugwa → chigumula ndi Babele → kuitana (Abrahamu) → dziko lolonjezedwa → Eksodo → m'chipululu → kugonjetsa → ufumu → kugawanika → ukapolo → kubwerera.
s.je_kick: ② Chipangano Chatsopano — moyo wa Yesu
s.je_lead: Tsatirani moyo wa Yesu monga Mauthenga akunenera, motsatira — kuyambira kubadwa kwake ku Betelehemu kupyola ubatizo wake ndi utumiki wa ku Galileya, kuwoloka Samariya, mpaka mtanda, kuuka ndi kukwera kumwamba ku Yerusalemu.
s.pa_kick: ③ Chipangano Chatsopano — maulendo a Paulo
s.pa_h: Kuyambira Antiokeya mpaka malekezero a dziko — Roma
s.pa_lead: Kuyambira Pentekoste ku Yerusalemu, mmene Uthenga Wabwino unafalikira kupyola Yudeya — kudzera mu Asia Wamng'ono ndi Ulaya mpaka pakatikati pa ufumu. Sankhani umodzi wa maulendo asanu (woyamba·wachiwiri·wachitatu + ulendo wopita ku Roma + atamasulidwa) ndipo tsatirani zochitika za Machitidwe pamodzi ndi makalata olembedwa panjira.
s.foot: Magwero · Malo amatsatira mawu a Baibulo ndi nthawi zonse jiogalafi ya Baibulo (ndi maina amakono pamene zithandiza). Magombe, mitsinje ndi nyanja zinajambulidwa kuchokera ku deta yotseguka ya jiogalafi (Natural Earth), zomwe zinaproshedwa.

eden.name: Edeni (Chilengedwe · Kugwa)
eden.note: M'dziko lopangidwa labwino kwambiri, uchimo ukulowa ndi kuthyola ubale pakati pa Mulungu ndi anthu.
events: Chilengedwe mu masiku asanu ndi limodzi — “linali labwino kwambiri”
Munthu wopangidwa mu chifaniziro cha Mulungu
Kugwa, ndi kuthamangitsidwa ku Edeni
Lonjezo loyamba la Uthenga Wabwino — “mbeu ya mkazi idzalalira mutu wa njoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Chigumula)
noah.today: Phiri la Ararati, kum'mawa kwa Turkey lero
noah.note: Mulungu akuweruza dziko lodzaza ndi uchimo, komabe akusunga moyo kudzera mu banja limodzi.
events: Dziko lodzaza ndi kuwonongeka
Chigumula, ndi chombo cha Nowa
Pangano la utawaleza — “sipadzakhalanso chigumula chowononga”

babel.name: Nsanja ya Babele
babel.note: Potsutsana ndi kudzitukumula kofuna kufika kumwamba, Mulungu akusokoneza chinenero chawo ndi kubalalitsa anthu pa dziko.
events: “Tiyeni timange mzinda ndi nsanja… ndi kudzipangira dzina”
Mulungu akusokoneza chinenero chawo
Anthu akubalalika pa dziko (Sinara — pambuyo pake Babiloni)

ur.name: Uri
ur.note: Nkhani ya chiwombolo ya Baibulo ikuyamba ndi kuitana kwa munthu mmodzi.
events: Mulungu akuitana Abramu kuchoka ku Uri wa Akaldeya
“Ndidzakuyesa iwe mtundu waukulu… mabanja onse adzadalitsidwa mwa iwe”
Mwa chikhulupiriro akusiya dziko lakwawo

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Panjira, akuyankha kuitanaku kuloza ku dziko lolonjezedwa.
events: Banja la Tera likukhazikika ku Harani
Tera akumwalira
Abramu akunyamuka kupita ku Kanani ali ndi zaka 75

shechem.name: Sekemu · Kanani
shechem.note: M'dziko lolonjezedwa banja likukhazikitsidwa ndipo pangano likupitirira ku mibadwo.
events: Kulowa ku Kanani, guwa loyamba — “mbeu yako ndidzaipatsa dziko ili”
Pangano (Gen 15) · Isake · Yakobo
Ana khumi ndi awiri a Yakobo — muzu wa mafuko khumi ndi awiri

egypt.name: Ejipito (Goseni)
egypt.note: Banja likusanduka mtundu waukulu — kenako mtundu wa akapolo.
events: Yosefe, wogulitsidwa, akukwera kukhala wolamulira Ejipito
Banja lonse la Yakobo likutsika kuti lipulumuke njala
Mtundu wa Israele wokula ukusandutsidwa akapolo

sinai.name: Phiri la Sinai
sinai.note: Chiwombolo chachikulu cha Chipangano Chakale — akapolo akusanduka anthu a Mulungu.
events: Miliri khumi ndi mwana wankhosa wa Paska
Nyanja Yofiira ikugawanika ndipo akuwoloka
Malamulo Khumi, Chilamulo, chihema ndi nsembe

kadesh.name: Kadesi (chipululu)
kadesh.note: Kusakhulupirira kukulanda mbadwo dziko — komabe Mulungu akukhalabe nawo.
events: Akazitape khumi ndi awiri — koma anthu akukana kukhulupirira
Zaka 38 m'chipululu — mana, mtambo ndi moto
Pa zigwa za Mowabu, ulaliki wotsiriza wa Mose (Deuteronomo)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Potsiriza akulowa ndi kulanda dziko lolonjezedwa.
events: Yorodano ikugawanika ndipo anthu akuwoloka
Malinga a Yeriko akugwa
Kugonjetsa Kanani ndi kugawana dziko

shiloh.name: Silo (Oweruza)
shiloh.note: Popanda mfumu, aliyense akuchita chomkomera — mfumu yeniyeni ikufunika.
events: Chihema chikuyimikidwa ku Silo
Kuzungulira kwa uchimo–kuponderezedwa–chiwombolo (Debora, Gidiyoni, Samsoni)
Rute — kukhulupirika m'masiku a mdima, mu mzere wa Davide

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu · Ufumu Wogwirizana
jerusalem.note: Nthawi ya uremu ya Israele — ndi lonjezo la mfumu yosatha.
events: Sauli mfumu yoyamba, kenako Davide ndi Goliyati
Pangano la Davide — “mpando wako wachifumu ku nthawi zonse” (2 Sam 7)
Solomoni akumanga Kachisi ku Yerusalemu

samaria.name: Samariya · Ufumu Wogawanika
samaria.note: Ufumu ukugawanika ndi kuchepa pamene aneneri akulira.
events: Solomoni atamwalira, kugawanika kukhala Yuda ndi Israele
Kupembedza mafano kobwerezabwereza
Eliya, Yesaya, Yeremiya akulira ‘bwererani’ — ndi kulosera za Mesiya

nineveh.name: Ninive (Asuri)
nineveh.note: Ponyalanyaza chenjezo lililonse, kumpoto kukugwa poyamba.
events: Ninive, likulu la Asuri
Ufumu wakumpoto ukugwa kwa Asuri (722 B.C.)
Yona akutumidwa ku Ninive

babylon.name: Babiloni
babylon.note: Usiku wamdima koposa — komabe lonjezo la kubwezeretsedwa likukhalabe.
events: Yerusalemu likugwa, Kachisi akutenthedwa (586 B.C.)
Yuda akutengedwa ku Babiloni
Danieli ndi Ezekieli — chikhulupiriro ndi masomphenya mu ukapolo

susa.name: Susa (Perisiya)
susa.note: Ngakhale pakatikati pa ufumu wachikunja, Mulungu akusunga anthu ake.
events: Perisiya akugonjetsa Babiloni
Estere akupulumutsa Ayuda ku chiwonongeko
Nehemiya akupemphera pamaso pa mfumu ndipo akutumidwa

return.name: Kubwerera ku Yerusalemu
return.note: Akubwerera ndi kumanganso — koma palibe mfumu yobwera. Akudikira Mesiya.
events: Magulu atatu obwerera mwa lamulo la Koresi (Zerubabeli 538 · Ezara 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Kachisi womangidwanso ndi malinga a Yerusalemu obwezeretsedwa
Malaki — Chipangano Chakale chikutha: “ndidzatuma mthenga wanga”

bethlehem.name: Betelehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesiya wolonjezedwa akufika ku mzinda wa Davide — Mau wosandulika thupi.
events: Anabadwira ku Betelehemu, mzinda wa Davide
Angelo akulengeza nkhaniyi kwa abusa
Anzeru akudza kudzapembedza

nazareth.name: Nazareti
nazareth.note: Mulungu akukulira ngati munthu mu mzinda wofala.
events: Analeredwa m'nyumba ya mmisiri wa matabwa
Ali ndi zaka khumi ndi ziwiri, akufunsa ndi kuyankha m'Kachisi
Pambuyo pake anakanidwa mu sunagoge wa kwawo

jordan.name: Mtsinje wa Yorodano
jordan.note: Utumiki wake wapoyera ukuyamba — kumwamba kukumtsimikiza ngati Mwana.
events: Anabatizidwa ndi Yohane
Mzimu akutsika ngati nkhunda — “Uyu ndiye Mwana wanga wokondedwa”
Akugonjetsa mayesero atatu a Satana m'chipululu

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu chizindikiro chake choyamba akuwonetsa ulemerero wake.
events: Mlendo pa ukwati
Madzi anasandulika vinyo — chizindikiro chake choyamba
Ophunzira ake akukhulupirira mwa Iye

sychar.name: Sukari (Samariya)
sychar.note: Njira ya utumiki woyambirira — kupyola Yerusalemu ndi kupita ku Samariya wonyozeka.
events: Akuyeretsa Kachisi ku Yerusalemu
Usiku, Nikodemo — “Uyenera kubadwanso”
Madzi a moyo kwa mkazi wa ku Samariya

capernaum.name: Kapernao
capernaum.today: m'mphepete mwa nyanja ya Galileya lero
capernaum.note: Likulu la utumiki wa ku Galileya — kuitana, kuphunzitsa ndi kutsutsa zonse zikukumana apa.
events: Akuitana asodzi ndipo akukhazikika apa
Ulaliki wa pa Phiri — “Odala ndi osauka mu mzimu”
Mafanizo a ufumu — ndi kutsutsa kukukula

galilee.name: Nyanja ya Galileya
galilee.note: Ndi mphamvu pa chilengedwe akuwonetsa kuti ndi ndani.
events: “Khala chete” — akuletsa namondwe
Akudyetsa 5,000 ndi mikate isanu ndi nsomba ziwiri
Akuyenda pa madzi

caesarea_p.name: Kaisareya wa Filipo
caesarea_p.note: Ophunzira akuzindikira kuti Iye ndi Khristu, ndipo njira ya mtanda ikutsegulika.
events: Chivomerezo cha Petro — “Inu ndinu Khristu, Mwana wa Mulungu wamoyo”
Akulosera koyamba za imfa ndi kuuka kwake
Akusandulika mu ulemerero pa phiri

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Panjira yokwera ku Yerusalemu, akufunafuna otayika.
events: Akupatsa maso Batimeyo wakhungu
Akuitana Zakeyu wokhometsa msonkho
“Mwana wa munthu anadza kufunafuna ndi kupulumutsa otayika”

bethany.name: Betaniya
bethany.note: Akuwonetsa ulamuliro pa imfa pa tsiku loyandikira sabata yake yotsiriza.
events: Akuukitsa Lazaro ku manda — “Ine ndine kuuka ndi moyo”
Mariya akumdzoza chifukwa cha kuyikidwa kwake
Chizindikiro ichi chikulimbitsa chiwembu chofuna kumpha

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Nsonga imene Baibulo lonse likuloza — mtanda, kuuka, kukwera kumwamba.
events: Kulowa mwaulemu; akugubuduza matebulo a Kachisi kachiwiri
Pa Mgonero Wotsiriza akusambitsa mapazi a ophunzira
Akufa pa mtanda
Anauka tsiku lachitatu, kenako anakwera kumwamba

antioch.name: Antiokeya
antioch.note: Mpingo wotumiza kumene umishonale wa amitundu ukuyamba ndi kubwerera.
events: Mu pemphero Mzimu akupatula Barnaba ndi Saulo
Mpingo umene okhulupirira anayamba kutchedwa ‘Akhristu’
Poyambira maulendo woyamba, wachiwiri ndi wachitatu

seleucia.name: Seleukiya
seleucia.note: Doko la Antiokeya — akukwera sitima kupita ku Kupro.

salamis.name: Salami (Kupro)
salamis.note: Malo oyamba pa Kupro — kulalikira m'masunagoge.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Mphamvu ikuwonetsedwa kwa amene akutsutsa Uthenga Wabwino.
events: Elima wamatsenga akuchititsidwa khungu
Sergio Paulo bwanamkubwa akukhulupirira
Kuyambira apa ‘Paulo’ akutsogolera

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Doko la ku Pamfiliya — apa Yohane Marko akubwerera.

pantioch.name: Antiokeya wa Pisidiya
events: Ulaliki wautali wa mbiri ya chipulumutso mu sunagoge
Amitundu ambiri akukondwera ndi kulandira mawu
Akuthamangitsidwa ndi otsutsa

iconium.name: Ikoniya
iconium.note: Ambiri akukhulupirira, koma chizunzo chikuwakakamiza kupita.

lystra.name: Lusitra
events: Akuchiritsa munthu wolumala kuyambira kubadwa
Khamu likufuna kuwapereka nsembe ngati milungu
Atamponya miyala namusiya ngati wakufa, akudzuka

derbe.name: Derbe
derbe.note: Ophunzira ambiri akupangidwa; akubwereranso kukalimbitsa mipingo.

troas.name: Trowa
troas.note: Malo otembenukira kumene Uthenga Wabwino ukuloza ku Ulaya koyamba.
events: Masomphenya a munthu wa ku Makedoniya
“Wolokerani kuno mudzatithandize”
Akuwolokera ku Ulaya pomwepo

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Mpingo woyamba wa Ulaya — Uthenga Wabwino ukupambana ngakhale m'ndende.
events: Lidiya, wamalonda a nsalu zofiira, akukhulupirira
Kapolo wamkazi wolosera akumasulidwa
Nyimbo za pakati pa usiku, chivomezi, banja la woyang'anira ndende likupulumuka

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Mawu akugwedeza mzinda ndipo kutsutsa kukuchuluka.
events: Akukambirana mu sunagoge masabata atatu
“Awa amene anasokoneza dziko”
Akuthawa usiku

berea.name: Bereya
events: Akulandira mawu mwachidwi
Tsiku ndi tsiku akusanthula Malemba kuti atsimikize
Ambiri akukhulupirira

athens.name: Atene
athens.note: Mu mzinda wa anzeru akulalikira za ‘mulungu wosadziwika’.
events: Akukwiyitsidwa ndi mzinda wodzaza mafano
Pa Areopago akulalikira za Mlengi ndi kuuka
Akunyozedwa, komabe ochepa akukhulupirira

corinth.name: Korinto
corinth.note: Akukhala chaka ndi theka, akukhazikitsa mpingo mu mzinda wa zoipa.
events: Akupanga matenti ndi Akula ndi Prisila
“Usaope… pakuti ndili nawe”
Akorinto ambiri akukhulupirira ndi kubatizidwa

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Mtima wa ulendo wachitatu — mawu akufalikira ku Asia.
events: Kuphunzitsa tsiku ndi tsiku zaka ziwiri mu nyumba ya Turano
Mabuku a matsenga akutenthedwa; ntchito zamphamvu
Demetrio wopanga siliva akuyambitsa chipolowe

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Kutsanzikana kwamisozi ndi akulu a mpingo wa ku Efeso.
events: “Wetani mpingo umene anaugula ndi mwazi wake”
Akulu akulira, podziwa kuti sadzamuonanso

caesarea.name: Kaisareya
caesarea.today: m'mphepete mwa nyanja ya Israele lero
caesarea.note: Kwa zaka ziwiri akuteteza Uthenga Wabwino pamaso pa abwanamkubwa ndi mfumu.
events: Maweruzo pamaso pa abwanamkubwa Felike ndi Festo
Kudziteteza kwake pamaso pa Mfumu Agripa
“Ndapempha kwa Kaisara” — kupita ku Roma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Atagwidwa m'Kachisi, njira yake ngati mkaidi ikuyamba.
events: Akugwidwa ndi khamu m'Kachisi
Akudziteteza pamaso pa bwalo
Monga nzika ya Roma, akutumizidwa moyang'aniridwa ku Kaisareya

myra.name: Mura
myra.note: Akusamukira ku sitima ya ku Alesandriya yopita ku Roma.

fairhaven.name: Madoko Abwino (Krete)
fairhaven.note: Chenjezo la Paulo loletsa kuyenda likunyalanyazidwa.

crete.name: Krete
crete.note: Atamasulidwa, chilumba kumene akusiya Tito kuti akonze mipingo.
events: Akusiya Tito kuti aike akulu m'mzinda uliwonse
Akufuna atsogoleri opanda chilema, okhulupirika
Akulemba kalata kwa Tito

malta.name: Melita
malta.note: Kupyola namondwe ndi kusweka kwa sitima, lonjezo la Mulungu likukhalabe.
events: Mphepo ya ‘kumpoto-chakum'mawa’ ikusweka sitima, komabe onse 276 akupulumuka
Atalumidwa ndi njoka, sakuvulazidwa
Akuchiritsa odwala a chilumbacho

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Akufika ku Italy ndipo akukomeredwa ndi okhulupirira anzawo.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Uthenga Wabwino ukufika pakatikati pa ufumu potsiriza — osati mapeto koma chiyambi.
events: Zaka ziwiri ali mu ndende ya panyumba, akulalikira ufumu molimba mtima
Kuchokera apa akulemba Makalata a M'ndende (Aefeso·Afilipi·Akolose·Filemoni)
Pambuyo pake akutsekedwanso, akulemba 2 Timoteo ndipo akuphedwa — “Ndamenya nkhondo yabwino, ndamaliza mpikisano”
